_doc_claude_binary: macOS: /opt/homebrew/bin/claude  |  Windows (git-bash): output van `which claude.exe`, bv. /c/Users/<user>/AppData/Roaming/npm/claude.cmd of /c/Users/<user>/AppData/Local/Programs/claude/claude.exe
_doc_discord_bot_script: macOS: ~/.claude/scripts/discord-bot.sh  |  Windows: idem als git-bash die pad herkent, anders full path naar de .sh
